    68    }
    69    return "";
    70  }

  Ran 1 shell command

⏺ The name guard fixed the egregious cases. Running the full set.

  Running 1 shell command…

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 Bash command

   cd /Users/throxy/Documents/throxy; bun --env-file=.env packages/api/scripts/_ym-serp-enrich.ts &
   echo "started full SERP enrichment in background"
   Run full SERP enrichment (1,571 rows)

 This command uses the `&` background operator, which defers execution past approval-time safety checks.

 Do you want to proceed?
 ❯ 1. Yes
   2. Yes, and always allow access to scrapes/ from this project
   3. No
